Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4D00 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Zulu.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $7100 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $7000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zulu.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $7000 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
